simple_types.name: Constant_Reference_Type
simple_types.code:
type Constant_Reference_Type
   (Element : not null access constant Element_Type) is
private
with
   Implicit_Dereference => Element;

simple_types.name: Cursor
simple_types.code: type Cursor is private with Preelaborable_Initialization;

tagged_types.name: Set
tagged_types.code:
type Set (Capacity : Count_Type) is tagged private
with Constant_Indexing => Constant_Reference,
     Default_Iterator  => Iterate,
     Iterator_Element  => Element_Type,
     Aggregate         => (Empty       => Empty,
                           Add_Unnamed => Include),
     Preelaborable_Initialization
                       => Element_Type'Preelaborable_Initialization;

subprograms.code: function "-" (Left, Right : Set) return Set
function "<" (Left, Right : Cursor) return Boolean
function "<" (Left : Cursor; Right : Element_Type) return Boolean
function "<" (Left : Element_Type; Right : Cursor) return Boolean
function "=" (Left, Right : Set) return Boolean
function ">" (Left, Right : Cursor) return Boolean
function ">" (Left : Cursor; Right : Element_Type) return Boolean
function ">" (Left : Element_Type; Right : Cursor) return Boolean
